hero.headline: Your ads.
hero.subheadline: Most ad tools automate the easy part. Vigmis measures whether decisions actually worked — then gets smarter every week.
hero.ctaNote: No credit card required. Setup in 5 minutes.

socialProof.headline: Trusted by small businesses across the US
socialProof.sub: From local restaurants to e-commerce stores — Vigmis handles the ads.

howItWorks.headline: Get started in under 5 minutes
howItWorks.subheadline: No marketing expertise needed. Vigmis does the heavy lifting.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Link your Google Ads and Meta Ads accounts with one click. Vigmis gets instant access to start optimizing.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Answer a quick 60-second chat about your business goals and target customers. Our AI takes it from there.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Sit back while AI continuously optimizes your campaigns 24/7, adjusting bids, targeting, and budgets in real time.

features.headline: Powerful features. Zero complexity.
features.subheadline: Vigmis packs enterprise-grade ad tech into a tool any small business owner can use.
features.f1Desc: Our AI analyzes thousands of data points daily to improve your ad performance automatically — no manual tuning required.
features.f2Desc: Manage campaigns across Google Search, Display, YouTube, Facebook, and Instagram from a single unified dashboard.
features.f3Desc: See exactly how your money is performing with live metrics, clear charts, and actionable insights — all in plain English.
features.f4Desc: AI shifts budget to the best-performing campaigns automatically, so every dollar works as hard as possible.
features.f5Desc: Your ads never sleep. Vigmis monitors and adjusts your campaigns around the clock, even on weekends and holidays.
features.f6Desc: Weekly email summaries and on-demand reports show what's working, what improved, and what your ROI looks like.
features.f7Desc: See three numbers side by side: what the platform reports, what Google Analytics attributes, and what Vigmis estimates you actually caused. Most tools only show you the first one.
features.f8Desc: When the same $1 produces different returns on Google vs. Meta, Vigmis flags it and suggests a reallocation. Capital flows to the platform that's actually winning right now.

learningCurve.headline: The only ad platform that learns your business — not just your ads.
learningCurve.subheadline: Every decision Vigmis makes is logged. Every outcome is measured 10 days later. Over time, Vigmis knows which decisions worked for your specific business — and stops repeating the ones that didn't.
learningCurve.stat1Desc: Every optimization, budget change, and creative swap is recorded with its outcome.
learningCurve.stat2Desc: Tenants on Vigmis for 90+ days see better batting average on optimization decisions.
learningCurve.stat3Desc: Portfolio reallocation suggestions are based on GA4 ground truth, not platform self-reporting.

pricing.headline: Pay only when your ads perform
pricing.subheadline: No hidden fees. No long-term contracts. Cancel any time.
pricing.feeNote: Managed spend fee covers AI infrastructure, platform access, and ongoing optimization. You always control the budget.
pricing.example: Example: $1,000/mo ad spend on Free = $70 fee. Total cost = $70/mo.
pricing.examplePro: Example: $1,000/mo ad spend on Pro = $15 + $50 fee. Total cost = $65/mo.

faq.headline: Questions? We have answers.
faq.q1: Do I need any marketing experience?
faq.a1: Not at all. Vigmis is built specifically for business owners — not marketers. You tell us about your business in 60 seconds and AI handles everything else.
faq.q2: How does the percentage fee work?
faq.a2: You pay a small percentage of your ad spend — 7% on the Free plan, 5% on Pro. For example, if you spend $500/month on ads, your Vigmis fee is $35 (Free) or $25 + $15 (Pro). You always control your ad budget and can adjust or pause at any time.
faq.q3: Which ad platforms do you support?
faq.a3: Vigmis currently supports Google Ads (Search, Display, Shopping) and Meta Ads (Facebook and Instagram). More platforms are coming soon.
faq.q4: Can I cancel at any time?
faq.a4: Absolutely. There are no contracts or commitments. You can cancel, pause, or downgrade your plan at any time from your account settings.
faq.q5: Is my ad account data safe?
faq.a5: Yes. We use read/write API access with strict permissions. We never store your payment methods or access anything outside your ad accounts. All data is encrypted and handled under our Privacy Policy.
faq.q6: What happens when I upgrade from Free to Pro?
faq.a6: Your campaigns immediately get access to priority AI optimization, unlimited spend capacity, and all Pro features. You're billed $15 on the day you upgrade, then monthly from that date.

ctaBanner.headline: Start growing your business today
ctaBanner.subheadline: Join 500+ businesses that let AI run their ads. Setup takes 5 minutes.

footer.tagline: AI-powered Google & Meta Ads automation for small businesses.
footer.madeWith: Made with ❤️ for small business owners

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Vigmis ("we", "us", or "our") operates the Vigmis platform accessible at vigmis.com and app.vigmis.com. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our service.
privacy.section1Body:
We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, connect advertising accounts, or contact support. This includes:

• Account information: name, email address, and password
• Business information: business name, industry, website, and goals
• Ad account credentials: OAuth tokens for Google Ads and Meta Ads (we never store passwords)
• Billing information: handled by our payment processor (Stripe); we store only the last 4 digits of your card and billing address
• Usage data: how you interact with the Vigmis platform, features used, and settings configured
• Communications: emails or messages you send to our support team
privacy.section2Body:
We use the information we collect to:

• Provide, maintain, and improve the Vigmis platform
• Automate and optimize your advertising campaigns
• Process payments and send billing notifications
• Send you transactional emails (account changes, performance reports)
• Send marketing emails only with your consent (you can unsubscribe any time)
• Respond to your comments and questions
• Monitor and analyze usage patterns to improve our service
• Detect and prevent fraud or abuse
• Comply with legal obligations
privacy.section3Body:
We do not sell your personal information. We may share information with:

• Service providers: companies that help us operate our service (cloud hosting, payment processing, email delivery) under strict data processing agreements
• Google and Meta: as required to manage your advertising campaigns through their APIs
• Legal authorities: when required by law or to protect our rights
• Business transfers: if Vigmis is acquired or merges, your data may transfer as a business asset (you will be notified)
privacy.section4Body: We retain your account data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services. If you delete your account, we delete or anonymize your personal data within 30 days, except where we are legally required to retain it (e.g., billing records for 7 years for tax compliance).
privacy.section5Body:
Depending on your location, you may have the following rights:

• Access: Request a copy of the personal data we hold about you
• Correction: Request correction of inaccurate data
• Deletion: Request deletion of your personal data ("right to be forgotten")
• Portability: Receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format
• Objection: Object to certain types of processing (e.g., direct marketing)
• Restriction: Request that we limit how we use your data

To exercise any of these rights, contact us at privacy@vigmis.com. We will respond within 30 days.
privacy.section6Body:
We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to:

• Keep you logged in
• Remember your preferences
• Analyze site traffic (via Google Analytics)
• Improve platform performance

You can control cookies through your browser settings. Disabling certain cookies may affect functionality.
privacy.section7Body: We use industry-standard security measures including TLS encryption in transit, AES-256 encryption at rest, regular security audits, and strict access controls. No method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.section8Body: Vigmis is not directed to individuals under 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe we have inadvertently collected such information, please contact us immediately.
privacy.section9Body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of material changes by email or by posting a notice on our website. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance.
privacy.section10Body:
If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

Vigmis
Email: privacy@vigmis.com
Website: vigmis.com

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the Vigmis platform. By creating an account or using our service, you agree to be bound by these Terms. Please read them carefully.
terms.section1Body: Vigmis provides an AI-powered advertising automation platform that connects to Google Ads and Meta Ads accounts to manage, optimize, and report on advertising campaigns on behalf of users. The service is provided as-is on a subscription and/or performance-fee basis.
terms.section2Body:
To use Vigmis, you must:

• Be at least 18 years old
• Provide accurate and complete registration information
• Maintain the security of your account credentials
• Notify us immediately of any unauthorized access
• Be responsible for all activity that occurs under your account
terms.section3Body:
Free Plan: There is no monthly subscription fee. You pay a service fee equal to 7% of your total managed ad spend, billed monthly.

Pro Plan: You pay a monthly subscription fee of $15.00, plus a service fee equal to 5% of your total managed ad spend, billed monthly.

All fees are in USD. Payments are processed via Stripe. Your subscription renews automatically unless cancelled. We reserve the right to adjust pricing with 30 days' notice.
terms.section4Body: You may cancel your subscription at any time from your account settings. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period. We do not offer refunds for partial months or unused service, except as required by law. Performance fees for completed billing periods are non-refundable.
terms.section5Body:
You agree not to use Vigmis to:

• Violate any applicable law or regulation
• Advertise illegal products or services
• Engage in deceptive or misleading advertising
• Violate Google's or Meta's advertising policies
• Attempt to reverse engineer or circumvent the platform
• Share your account with unauthorized third parties
terms.section6Body: By connecting your Google Ads or Meta Ads account, you grant Vigmis permission to create, modify, pause, and report on campaigns on your behalf. You retain ownership of your ad accounts and all campaign data. You may revoke access at any time from the connected platforms. Vigmis is not responsible for campaign performance outcomes.
terms.section7Body: The Vigmis platform, including its software, design, and content, is owned by Vigmis and protected by intellectual property laws. You may not copy, modify, or distribute our platform without permission. You retain all rights to your business content and ad creative materials.
terms.section8Body:
THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND. VIGMIS DOES NOT GUARANTEE SPECIFIC ADVERTISING RESULTS, REVENUE, OR RETURN ON AD SPEND.

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, VIGMIS SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, INCLUDING LOSS OF PROFITS OR DATA. OUR TOTAL LIABILITY SHALL NOT EXCEED THE FEES PAID BY YOU IN THE 12 MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM.
terms.section9Body: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless Vigmis, its officers, directors, employees, and agents from any claims, damages, or expenses (including legal fees) arising out of your use of the service, your violation of these Terms, or your violation of any third-party rights.
terms.section10Body: We may suspend or terminate your account at any time if we believe you have violated these Terms, engaged in fraudulent activity, or pose a risk to other users. You may terminate your account at any time. Upon termination, your access to the platform ceases and we will delete your data as described in our Privacy Policy.
terms.section11Body: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Delaware, United States, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Any disputes shall be resolved through binding arbitration in accordance with the American Arbitration Association rules.
terms.section12Body: We may modify these Terms at any time. We will provide at least 14 days' notice of material changes via email. Your continued use of the service after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.
terms.section13Body:
Questions about these Terms? Contact us at:

Vigmis
Email: legal@vigmis.com
Website: vigmis.com
